mapper.select: /* selectVehicleDriverMappingForApi */ SELECT SU.USERKEY , SU.USERACT , SU.VOWNKEY , SU.VEHICKY , SM.USERNAM , SM.TELPHNM FROM ${common.commonSchema}.SUSRVH SU INNER JOIN ${common.commonSchema}.SUSRMA SM ON SM.USERKEY = SU.USERKEY AND SM.USERACT = SU.USERACT WHERE SU.VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND SU.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND SU.VHUSEYN = 'Y'

/* selectOutboundOrderHeaderListForApi */ SELECT
OUTBOKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, RSNCODE, PARSNNM, SHPWEIG, OBODATE, OBOTIME, OBOSTAT, ENTDATE, ENTTIME, EXTDATE, EXTTIME,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK FROM ${common.schema}.OOUBHD OBH WHERE OBH.OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} GROUP BY
OUTBOKY,
WAREKEY, DOCCATE, DOCTYPE, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, RSNCODE, PARSNNM, SHPWEIG, OBODATE, OBOTIME, OBOSTAT, ENTDATE, ENTTIME, EXTDATE, EXTTIME,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER, UPDTCHK

/* selectOutboundOrderItemListForApi */ SELECT
OBI.OUTBOKY, OBI.OUTBOIT,
OBI.DOCCATE, OBI.DOCTYPE, OBI.WAREKEY, OBI.POSHPDT, OBI.POSHPTM, OBI.POSHPDY, OBI.OWNERKY, OBI.OWNRNAM, OBI.CUSTCOD, OBI.CUSTNAM, OBI.FNCUSKY, OBI.REGIORG, OBI.DESTORG, OBI.REGIMOD, OBI.DESTMOD, OBI.DEORGNM, OBI.DEMODNM, OBI.DEMODYN, OBI.DEMDMAN, OBI.DEMDADR, OBI.DEMPOCD, OBI.DEMDTLN, OBI.OBOMEMO, OBI.OUBRQDT, OBI.OUBRQTM, OBI.SKUGRKY, OBI.SKUMKEY, OBI.SKUDESC, OBI.SKUWEIG, OBI.SKUWIDT, OBI.SKULENG, OBI.SKUTHIC, OBI.GROSSWG, OBI.GROSSWD, OBI.GROSSLN, OBI.GROSSTH, OBI.FRAREKY, OBI.FRLOCKY, OBI.FRLAYER, OBI.SHLOCKY, OBI.RGITQTY, OBI.SHCFQTY, OBI.SUOMKEY, OBI.SHPPLKY, OBI.SHPPLIT, OBI.VHPLNKY, OBI.VHPLNIT, OBI.PLNSIZE, OBI.OBOITST, OBI.ITEMCOD, OBI.PURCNUM, OBI.ORDERLN, OBI.STLOTNB, OBI.SHPLIMT, OBI.DELVDSR, OBI.BTRFSTC, OBI.BTRCATE, OBI.ADDCOKY, OBI.PARSNCD, OBI.PARSNNM, OBI.CREDATE, OBI.CRETIME, OBI.CREUSER, OBI.LMODATE, OBI.LMOTIME, OBI.LMOUSER, OBI.UPDTCHK FROM ${common.schema}.OOUBIT OBI GROUP BY
OBI.OUTBOKY, OBI.OUTBOIT,
OBI.DOCCATE, OBI.DOCTYPE, OBI.WAREKEY, OBI.POSHPDT, OBI.POSHPTM, OBI.POSHPDY, OBI.OWNERKY, OBI.OWNRNAM, OBI.CUSTCOD, OBI.CUSTNAM, OBI.FNCUSKY, OBI.REGIORG, OBI.DESTORG, OBI.REGIMOD, OBI.DESTMOD, OBI.DEORGNM, OBI.DEMODNM, OBI.DEMODYN, OBI.DEMDMAN, OBI.DEMDADR, OBI.DEMPOCD, OBI.DEMDTLN, OBI.OBOMEMO, OBI.OUBRQDT, OBI.OUBRQTM, OBI.SKUGRKY, OBI.SKUMKEY, OBI.SKUDESC, OBI.SKUWEIG, OBI.SKUWIDT, OBI.SKULENG, OBI.SKUTHIC, OBI.GROSSWG, OBI.GROSSWD, OBI.GROSSLN, OBI.GROSSTH, OBI.FRAREKY, OBI.FRLOCKY, OBI.FRLAYER, OBI.SHLOCKY, OBI.RGITQTY, OBI.SHCFQTY, OBI.SUOMKEY, OBI.SHPPLKY, OBI.SHPPLIT, OBI.VHPLNKY, OBI.VHPLNIT, OBI.PLNSIZE, OBI.OBOITST, OBI.ITEMCOD, OBI.PURCNUM, OBI.ORDERLN, OBI.STLOTNB, OBI.SHPLIMT, OBI.DELVDSR, OBI.BTRFSTC, OBI.BTRCATE, OBI.ADDCOKY, OBI.PARSNCD, OBI.PARSNNM, OBI.CREDATE, OBI.CRETIME, OBI.CREUSER, OBI.LMODATE, OBI.LMOTIME, OBI.LMOUSER, OBI.UPDTCHK

/* checkShipmentCompletionStatusForApi */ SELECT TP.SHPPLKY FROM ${common.schema}.TPWPWG TP INNER JOIN ${common.schema}.WPLNHD WP ON WP.SHPPLKY = TP.SHPPLKY WHERE TP.VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky} AND TP.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND TP.PLNSIZE = #{param.plnsize} AND TP.WPLCFYN = 'Y' AND TP.OOUCFYN = 'Y' AND TP.SHPCFYN = 'Y' AND WP.REMWEIG = 0 GROUP BY TP.SHPPLKY
/* selectCmpTargetWshpit */ SELECT SHPDCKY, WAREKEY FROM ${common.schema}.WSHPIT WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} AND SKUMKEY = #{param.skumkey} AND SHPITST != 'CANCEL' GROUP BY SHPDCKY, WAREKEY
/* selectShpdckyForApi */ SELECT ${common.schema}.FN_OM_SHPDCKY() AS SHPDCKY FROM DUAL
/* selectShpdcitForApi */ SELECT ${common.schema}.FN_OM_SHPDCIT(#{shpdcky}) AS SHPDCIT FROM DUAL
/* selectTaskokyForApi */ select ${common.schema}.fn_sm_taskoky() as taskoky from dual
/* selectTaskoitForApi */ select ${common.schema}.fn_sm_taskoit(#{taskoky}) as taskoit from dual

/* selectTplnitCountValidationListForApi */ SELECT COUNT(VHPLNKY) FROM ${common.schema}.TPLNIT WHERE VHPLNKY IN( SELECT VHPLNKY FROM ${common.schema}.OOUBIT WHERE OUTBOKY = #{param.outboky} GROUP BY VHPLNKY ) AND TPISTAT = 'PLAN' GROUP BY WAREKEY, VHPLNKY
